consistency.casting_time_and_action: Consistent. Standard casting time of 1 action.
consistency.range_and_effect_size: Consistent. 60 feet range supports the 15-foot cube volume limit.
consistency.duration_and_concentration: Consistent. Concentration requirement aligns with the ability to move the image as an action.
consistency.components_and_requirements: Consistent. V, S, M (a bit of fleece) are standard for this level/school.
consistency.class_availability: Consistent. Traditionally available to Bard, Sorcerer, and Wizard.

quality.clarity: High. The description clearly defines size limitations, sensory limitations (visual only), and interaction rules.
quality.mechanical_depth: Moderate. Provides clear mechanics for movement (action) and detection (Investigation check vs. Save DC).
quality.flavor: Good. Simple yet versatile utility spell.

mechanics.core_function: Creates a purely visual, immobile or mobile illusion within a 15-foot cube.
mechanics.interaction_vs_detection: Distinction between simple physical interaction (reveals illusion) and dedicated examination (requires DC check) is clear.
mechanics.action_economy: Requires an action to move the image, balancing its persistent nature.
mechanics.countering: Relies on a standard Intelligence (Investigation) check against the spell save DC for discerning the illusion.

analysis.suggestions: None. Data appears complete and accurate according to standard D&D 5e conventions.
